column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Manatee County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
Thanks SO much your updates!! In LWR and much appreciate it.
These tornado warnings are keeping you busy Dennis!
AI is a danger to the safety of people. I hope someone corrects this misinformation. A warning means a tornado has been sighted, correct?
they can be radar indicated, radar confirmed (debris showing on radar), or observed
wow, that's not good. Only a warning? Some are skeptical? I never look at these new ai things, now I know why....
Has the tornado warning that expired at 815 been renewed?
